Class ClientHandler

java.lang.Object
src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
handlers.ClientHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class ClientHandler extends AbstractClient
ClientHandler manages communication with the server for all client operations. It extends AbstractClient to provide a custom messaging protocol for the restaurant system. Responsibilities include: - Handling reservations - Managing users - Fetching reports - Managing restaurant tables and settings - Handling waiting lists This class follows a singleton pattern. Use ClientHandler.getClient() to access the instance.

    • updateRegularOpeningTime

      public void updateRegularOpeningTime(WeeklyOpeningHours hours)
      Updates the regular opening time for a specific day. Sends an update request to the server with the new opening time.
      Parameters:
      hours - the weekly opening hours object containing the day and opening time

    • updateRegularClosingTime

      public void updateRegularClosingTime(WeeklyOpeningHours hours)
      Updates the regular closing time for a specific day. Sends an update request to the server with the new closing time.
      Parameters:
      hours - the weekly opening hours object containing the day and closing time

    • deleteRegularOpeningHours

      public void deleteRegularOpeningHours(WeeklyOpeningHours wh)
      Deletes the regular opening hours for a specific day. Sends a delete request to the server if the provided object is not null.
      Parameters:
      wh - the weekly opening hours object containing the day to remove

    • setHandler

      public void setHandler(ReportType type, ReportHandler handler)
      Registers or replaces a report handler for a specific report type.
      Parameters:
      type - the report type
      handler - the handler responsible for processing the report response
